title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 445.120 - Penalty for violation of certain provisions
text:
445.120.  Penalty for violation of certain provisions. — Any person violating the provisions of sections 445.100 to 445.120 shall be guilty of a misdemeanor and shall be subject to a fine of not less than one hundred dollars nor more than five hundred dollars, or to imprisonment not exceeding one year, or both.
(RSMo 1939 § 12819) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 11195
